item.description: Don't underestimate the deals on gift cards, gas and more.

item.title: The U.S. Mint Has Canceled the Penny. Is the Nickel Next?
item.description: Rising costs and inflation raise questions about the nickel’s future after the penny’s demise.

item.description: Saving, tax planning and income diversification are key.

item.title: What Happens to Your Brokerage Account When You Die — And Why Many People Haven’t Set It Up Right
item.description: The process can get complicated if you don't identify a beneficiary.
